name: 网页视频演示
summary: Turn articles, scripts, lessons, and product demos into recordable 16:9 step-driven web presentations with theme tokens and recording guidance.
description: Use when turning an article, talk script, lesson, product demo, or narrated explanation into a recordable 16:9 web presentation with step-driven scenes, optional narration alignment, theme tokens, and screen-recording guidance; Chinese triggers include 网页视频, 动态演示, 口播稿转视频, 可录屏演示, 16:9 演示.

boundaryWorkflows: Use a UI design workflow for product-specific visual direction, asset strategy, anti-generic design, and visual QA of scenes.
Use image generation when the presentation needs custom raster assets, diagrams, storyboard frames, or generated visual references.
Use motion and responsive layout workflows when scene transitions, reduced-motion behavior, viewport scaling, or recording stability need deeper treatment.
